title: Some Finite Nilpotent <sub>p</sub>-Groups
author_string: Gupta, C. K., Gupta, N. D., Newman, M. F.
journal: Journal of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: Consider the following statement: For every positive integer n and every prime p there is a finite p-group of nilpotency class (precisely) c all of whose (n−1)-generator subgroups are nilpotent of class at most n.
